title: Resonant Routes - Music Pack
description: A resource pack that adds Pokemon music to biomes
body:
# Resonant Routes and Battles 
(Previously known as **Biome Specific Pokemon Music** from the Cobblemon discord)

Includes a number of remastered versions of music from different Pokemon games.
Each Biome has a playlist of different tracks that fit or match the specific biome and will automatically play while you explore in your world.

Music for Wild Battles, Player Battles, and NPC Battles are part of a separate pack [Resonant Battles](https://modrinth.com/project/jrT7BXsi)

**First Time Setup Guide**

- Install the [Music Control](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-control/version/1.8.3+1.21) mod for 1.21.1
- When you download the latest version, extract the zip
- You will find a zip and a folder after extracting which should be:
> Resonant Routes (the version matching the latest release) 
> 
> music_control
- Put these two in your resourcepacks folder and enable them.


- Change the mod config of music control and set the following under the events tab:
> Dimension events chance - **FALLBACK**
> 
> Misc events chance - **PROPORTIONAL**

You can also control the delay for how frequent you want music to be played if you have a mod menu installed.

## 

**Optional**:
- Support for **Terralith** and **WWEE** can be found in the additional files. Place them in your world's datapack folder. (_Only use this if you have one of these mods already installed._)

If you are using **William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld** (WWOO), you do not need to download any compatibility pack.

  
These datapacks contains the world generation files which may corrupt your world. Make sure you install the right datapack for your world

Check out the support thread if you have any questions.

The music in this pack were not made by me. Check out **Zame**, **Pokestir**, **StevenMix**, and **Bliitzit** on Youtube and support them for their great work!
